description.name: kwtSMS SMS Notifications
description.tagline: Automated SMS notifications for WHMCS through kwtSMS
description.long: Send automated SMS notifications to your WHMCS clients and admins through the kwtSMS gateway. Supports invoice paid, client registration, new order alerts, Arabic messages, test mode, full SMS logs, and gateway management.
features: Automated SMS on invoice paid and new registration
Admin SMS alerts on new orders
Gateway login, balance tracking, sender ID selection
Full SMS logs, security logs, debug logs
